title: Example 8-5 fatigue loading of tension joints

notes: Example 8-5 style input. The problem statement data are kept in the JSON input.
S_p and S_ut are fetched from table_8_9.csv. The fully corrected endurance strength S_e is fetched from table_8_17.csv.
The member stiffness follows the three-frusta cap-screw model in Fig. 8-21 using the assumptions in the figure caption.
